docket_entries.description: ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT DENIED*** BY PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATRIACCA, BEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LISS, ALEXANDRA PLAINTIFF FAILED TO MEET HIS BURDEN OF PROOF THAT THE DAMAGE WAS CAUSED BY DEFENDANT OR DEFENDANT'S TENANT, THAT THE CLAIM HAS BROUGHT WITHIN THE LIMITATIONS PERIOD, AND DAMAGES ESTIMATED FOR REPAIR WERE THE SAME DAMAGES ALLEGED YEARS EARLIER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER (SC-108) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATRIACCA, BEN AS TO DEFENDANT LISS, ALEXANDRA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,160.32 FILED BY PATRIACCA, BEN AS TO DEFENDANT LISS, ALEXANDRA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-26-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $164.78 SERVED JAN-27-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LISS, ALEXANDRA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-26-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-26-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH. PLAINTIFF BEN PATRIACCA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALEXANDRA LISS IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-26-2025 - JUDGMENT.
REMARK:RETURNED MAIL FROM THE POST OFFICE. 02/06/2025. SC-100 PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND ORDER TO GO TO SMALL CLAIMS COURT MAILED TO DEFENDANT. (RETURN TO SENDER UNCLAIMED UNABLE TO FORWARD)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATRIACCA, BEN AS TO DEFENDANT LISS, ALEXANDRA
